name: SynkNote
author: Panda Hub
description: SynkNote is a text-based piano note player for Roblox virtual piano games. Paste or type Virtual Piano notation directly into the built-in editor, set your BPM, and let it play. Comes with a preset song library spanning Modern, Anime, Emotional, Classical, Game OST, and Other categories, plus local save/load for your own songs. Extra features include loop mode, a float window for clean recording, anti-lag mode, a live note visualizer, and keyboard shortcuts ([ to play, ] to stop).
howToUse:
1. Paste or type Virtual Piano notes into the NOTES editor — use [ ] for chords, { } for sustained notes, - for a short pause, and | for a long pause
2. Open ⚙ Settings to set your BPM, or browse the 📂 Library to load a preset or saved song
3. Press ▶ Play (or the [ key) to start playback, and ] to stop
